product_overview: A small frontend test/product document that defines requirements and user flows for the app's authentication (sign-in, sign-up) and student booking forms. As noted in the raw PRD (page 1), this project is intended to test all forms inside the app using TestSprite.
core_goals: Validate end-to-end happy-path flows for login, registration, and student booking using the app routes.
Verify client-side validation and error handling for each form (invalid inputs, duplicate bookings, invalid credentials).
Provide reproducible step-by-step user flows that map directly to routes and UI interactions in the codebase.
Ensure required fields and terms agreement are enforced on registration and duplicate detection is surfaced on booking.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow existing users to sign in with email and password and optionally remember their session.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Check remember me box -> Click Login button to submit -> See successful login confirmation
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register a new user with full name, email, phone, selected subject and password while requiring terms agreement.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill full name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill phone input field -> Select subject from dropdown -> Fill password input field -> Check terms agreement checkbox -> Click Register button to submit -> See account created confirmation
Navigate to /register -> Fill full name input field -> Leave email or password or phone blank (or invalid) -> Click Register button to submit -> See error message on invalid inputs

features.name: Student Booking
features.description: Book a student into a specific teacher's group by filling student and parent details and submitting to the bookings table.
user_flows: Navigate to /7d6943e9-82d3-46dc-a4e3-ab9c35934262/57ec9b51-a4a5-4ac9-ae17-2dc3368061c3/book -> Fill student name input field -> Fill school input field -> Fill student phone input field -> Fill parent phone input field -> Click Submit booking button -> See booking confirmation

Navigate to /7d6943e9-82d3-46dc-a4e3-ab9c35934262/57ec9b51-a4a5-4ac9-ae17-2dc3368061c3/book -> Fill student name input field -> Fill school input field -> Fill student phone input field -> Fill parent phone input field -> Click Submit booking button -> See error message if inputs are invalid or duplicate booking exists
